title: Enhancement: Add pre-commit hooks for automated linting
body:
## Description
Implement pre-commit hooks to automate linting and formatting (using Ruff) before commits are made. This ensures code quality and prevents linting failures in the CI pipeline.

## Assessment
**Type**: Enhancement

## Proposed Solution
- Add `pre-commit` to dev dependencies in `pyproject.toml`.
- Create `.pre-commit-config.yaml` with Ruff hooks (lint and format).
- Fix existing lint errors revealed by the new hooks.
